metadata.title: The Reflex
metadata.lyrics:
[00:06.04] The reflex
[00:08.91] The reflex
[00:10.78] The reflex
[00:12.75] The reflex
[00:13.73] Fle-fle-fle-fle-flex
[00:16.00] You've gone too far this time
[00:18.75] But I'm dancing on the valentine
[00:23.61] I tell you somebody's fooling around
[00:26.47] With my chances on the danger line
[00:30.51] I'll cross that bridge when I find it
[00:33.76] Another day to make my stand, oh whoa
[00:38.68] High time is no time for deciding
[00:41.29] If I should find a helping hand, oh whoa
[00:46.27] Why don't you use it?
[00:49.90] Try not to bruise it
[00:53.84] Buy time, don't lose it
[01:01.21] Oh, why don't you use it?
[01:05.21] Try not to bruise it
[01:09.08] Buy time, don't lose it
[01:16.50] The reflex is a lonely child, he's waiting by the park
[01:24.25] The reflex is in charge of finding treasure in the dark
[01:31.75] And watching over lucky clover, isn't that bizarre?
[01:39.35] And every little thing the reflex does
[01:43.05] Leaves you answered with a question mark
[01:55.18] I'm on a ride and I wanna get off
[01:57.92] But they won't slow down the roundabout
[02:02.72] I sold the Renoir and TV set
[02:05.43] Don't wanna be around when this gets out
[02:09.78] So, why don't you use it?
[02:13.63] Try not to bruise it
[02:17.60] Buy time, don't lose it
[02:24.92] Why?
[02:26.34] Why? Why? Why?
[02:28.99] Why?
[02:30.18] Why? Why? Why?
[02:32.76] Why don't you use it?
[02:40.00] The reflex is a lonely child, he's waiting in the park
[02:47.63] The reflex is in charge of finding treasure in the dark
[02:55.07] And watching over lucky clover, isn't that bizarre?
[03:02.66] And every little thing the reflex does
[03:06.25] Leaves an answer with a question mark, play (fle-flex)
[03:25.03] So, why don't you use it?
[03:29.05] Try not to bruise it
[03:33.04] Buy time, don't lose it
[03:40.20] The reflex is a lonely child, he's waiting by the park
[03:47.66] The reflex is in charge of finding treasure in the dark
[03:54.97] And watching over lucky clover, isn't that bizarre?
[04:02.41] And every little thing the reflex does
[04:05.88] Leaves me answered with a question mark
[04:09.55] Oh, the reflex, what a game, he's hiding all the cards
[04:17.01] The reflex is in charge of finding treasure in the dark
